verdict_summary: All 3 sanitized JSONs written token-free; SSE response body absent because Chrome HAR exporter does not capture text/event-stream bodies (response.content.size=43075 but text='').

evidence.extraction_method: python (py -3, json.load + regex sanitizer adapted from sanitize_har_742.py)

notes: Key findings for V7-F engineering pivot: (1) Single perplexity_ask call observed: POST https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/sse/perplexity_ask, content-type=text/event-stream. Request body is JSON with params.dsl_query='What is 2+2?' and query_str='What is 2+2?' as the prompt fields, plus extensive feature flags (search_focus=internet, mode=copilot, model_preference=turbo, frontend_uuid, frontend_context_uuid). (2) HAR captures the request/headers but Chrome does NOT export the SSE response body (size=43075 reported but text empty). To capture chunks, use chrome.devtools.network or save-as-HAR-with-content from a stream-aware capture, or intercept via response stream directly. (3) /rest/thread/ traffic is metadata-only: list_pinned_ask_threads (POST, returns []) and mark_viewed/{thread_uuid} (POST, returns {"status":"success"}). No actual thread content streams through /rest/thread/ in the captured normal flow — confirming the V7-F pivot rationale. (4) Endpoint diversity: 1258 unique method+url stable keys (heavy CDN/asset traffic, plus /rest/* APIs).
